name: Sri Lanka Sri Lankan Omelette
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs.
2. Chop the onion, chile, and curry leaves.
3. Mix the chopped onion, chile, curry leaves, salt, pepper, and cornflour into the beaten eggs.
4. Heat oil in a pan.
5. Pour half of the omelette mixture into the hot oil.
6. Cook for a couple of minutes.
7. Carefully turn over and cook the other side.
8. Make another omelette with the remaining mixture.
